library.name: MOLT INSTRUCTION Library
library.description: Normalized instruction catalog produced during Stage 4

entries.name: Break into components
entries.action: Decompose complex system or concept into constituent parts
entries.expected_output: List of distinct components with relationships identified

entries.name: Compare side-by-side
entries.action: Place options in parallel structure with matched criteria
entries.expected_output: Comparison matrix or structured parallel evaluation

entries.name: Trace causality
entries.action: Follow chain of causes backward from observed effect
entries.expected_output: Causal chain from root cause to current state

entries.name: Identify patterns
entries.action: Look for recurring structures, relationships, or behaviors
entries.expected_output: Documented patterns with examples and frequency

entries.name: Measure against baseline
entries.action: Compare current state to established standard or prior state
entries.expected_output: Quantified deviation from baseline with significance

entries.name: Search systematically
entries.action: Query available sources using structured approach

entries.name: Extract key facts
entries.action: Identify and pull essential information from source material
entries.expected_output: List of facts with source references

entries.name: Consolidate sources
entries.action: Combine information from multiple sources into coherent summary
entries.expected_output: Synthesized view with conflicting information flagged

entries.name: Document context
entries.action: Record relevant background, constraints, and situational factors
entries.expected_output: Context description with key variables identified

entries.name: Verify claims
entries.action: Check assertions against reliable sources or evidence

entries.name: Generate alternatives
entries.action: Produce multiple distinct options or approaches
entries.expected_output: Set of diverse alternatives with key differences highlighted

entries.name: Combine concepts
entries.action: Merge disparate ideas into novel synthesis
entries.expected_output: New concept with lineage from source ideas

entries.name: Invert assumptions
entries.action: Flip conventional thinking to explore opposite approach

entries.name: Adapt existing solution
entries.action: Modify known approach to fit new context
entries.expected_output: Adapted solution with changes from original documented

entries.name: Sketch possibilities
entries.action: Create rough outlines of potential directions
entries.expected_output: Multiple sketches showing range of options

entries.name: State directly
entries.action: Express point clearly without hedging or indirection
entries.expected_output: Clear statement of position or information

entries.name: Provide examples
entries.action: Illustrate abstract concept with concrete instances

entries.name: Rephrase for clarity
entries.action: Restate complex point using simpler language

entries.name: Acknowledge perspective
entries.action: Explicitly recognize other viewpoint before responding
entries.expected_output: Statement showing understanding of other position

entries.name: Structure logically
entries.action: Organize points in clear sequence with transitions

entries.name: Check against requirements
entries.action: Verify each requirement is met by solution

entries.name: Test edge cases
entries.action: Evaluate behavior at boundary conditions

entries.name: Validate logic
entries.action: Verify reasoning chain has no gaps or errors
entries.expected_output: Logic chain review with any flaws identified

entries.name: Cross-check sources
entries.action: Compare information across multiple independent sources

entries.name: Simulate outcomes
entries.action: Project likely results of proposed action

entries.name: Isolate the problem
entries.action: Narrow down to specific failing component or step

entries.name: Remove blockers
entries.action: Identify and eliminate obstacles preventing progress
entries.expected_output: List of blockers with removal actions

entries.name: Apply known fix
entries.action: Implement standard solution for recognized problem type

entries.name: Work around limitation
entries.action: Find alternative path when direct approach blocked

entries.name: Iterate toward solution
entries.action: Make incremental improvements through repeated attempts
entries.expected_output: Series of refinements with progress tracking

entries.name: Define milestones
entries.action: Establish concrete checkpoints marking progress

entries.name: Sequence tasks
entries.action: Order work items based on dependencies

entries.name: Allocate resources
entries.action: Assign time, effort, or materials to activities

entries.name: Set priorities
entries.action: Rank items by importance or urgency

entries.name: Establish timeline
entries.action: Assign time estimates and deadlines to activities

entries.name: Rate against criteria
entries.action: Score performance on established dimensions
entries.expected_output: Numerical or categorical ratings per criterion

entries.name: Identify strengths
entries.action: Highlight what works well
entries.expected_output: List of positive aspects with supporting evidence

entries.name: Identify weaknesses
entries.action: Pinpoint areas needing improvement
entries.expected_output: List of problems with severity assessment

entries.name: Benchmark against standards
entries.action: Compare to industry norms or best practices

entries.name: Suggest improvements
entries.action: Propose specific changes to enhance quality

entries.name: Follow procedure
entries.action: Execute steps in prescribed sequence
entries.expected_output: Completed procedure with steps checked off

entries.name: Build incrementally
entries.action: Construct solution piece by piece with testing

entries.name: Delegate appropriately
entries.action: Assign tasks to capable parties with clear instructions
entries.expected_output: Delegation plan with assignments and expectations

entries.name: Monitor progress
entries.action: Track advancement toward goals with regular checks

entries.name: Adjust based on feedback
entries.action: Modify approach in response to results

entries.name: Document decisions
entries.action: Record what was decided and why

entries.name: Explain reasoning
entries.action: Articulate thought process from inputs to conclusion

entries.name: Annotate code
entries.action: Add comments explaining functionality and intent

entries.name: Create examples
entries.action: Generate sample usage or concrete instances

entries.name: Maintain changelog
entries.action: Record modifications with dates and reasons

entries.name: Study systematically
entries.action: Work through material in organized progression

entries.name: Practice deliberately
entries.action: Repeat skill with focused attention on improvement
entries.expected_output: Skill level increased through targeted practice

entries.name: Request feedback
entries.action: Explicitly ask for evaluation and suggestions

entries.name: Analyze mistakes
entries.action: Examine errors to understand root causes

entries.name: Apply learning
entries.action: Use newly acquired knowledge in practical context

entries.name: Synchronize with team
entries.action: Share status and coordinate activities
entries.expected_output: Team aligned on current state and next steps

entries.name: Resolve conflicts
entries.action: Address disagreements through structured dialogue
entries.expected_output: Conflict resolved with agreed path forward

entries.name: Share knowledge
entries.action: Distribute relevant information to appropriate parties
entries.expected_output: Knowledge transferred to those who need it

entries.name: Build consensus
entries.action: Work toward agreement through inclusive process
entries.expected_output: Group alignment on decision or approach

entries.name: Facilitate discussion
entries.action: Guide group conversation toward productive outcome

entries.name: Write clean code
entries.action: Produce readable, maintainable implementation
entries.expected_output: Code following style guidelines and best practices

entries.name: Refactor for clarity
entries.action: Restructure code to improve readability without changing behavior

entries.name: Add error handling
entries.action: Implement graceful failure and recovery mechanisms
entries.expected_output: Robust code that handles edge cases

entries.name: Write tests first
entries.action: Define expected behavior through test cases before implementing

entries.name: Optimize performance
entries.action: Improve speed or resource usage of working code

entries.name: Map landscape
entries.action: Document current state of environment and actors
entries.expected_output: Situational map showing key elements and relationships

entries.name: Identify opportunities
entries.action: Spot potential advantages or favorable conditions

entries.name: Assess threats
entries.action: Evaluate risks and potential negative developments

entries.name: Scenario plan
entries.action: Develop contingency plans for possible futures

entries.name: Position for advantage
entries.action: Take actions that improve future strategic position

entries.name: Run test suite
entries.action: Execute all tests and verify passing

entries.name: Review systematically
entries.action: Examine work using structured checklist

entries.name: Verify compliance
entries.action: Check adherence to standards and requirements

entries.name: Catch errors early
entries.action: Implement checks at earliest possible stage

entries.name: Maintain standards
entries.action: Apply quality criteria consistently

entries.name: Check governance rules
entries.action: Verify action against established governance constraints

entries.name: Escalate to authority
entries.action: Route decision to appropriate authority level

entries.name: Create audit trail
entries.action: Document actions and decisions for review

entries.name: Enforce boundaries
entries.action: Prevent actions outside authorized scope

entries.name: Report violations
entries.action: Flag governance breaches for review

entries.name: Eliminate redundancy
entries.action: Remove duplicate or unnecessary work

entries.name: Automate repetitive tasks
entries.action: Create scripts or processes for recurring work

entries.name: Batch similar work
entries.action: Group related tasks for efficient processing
entries.expected_output: Batched activities with reduced context switching

entries.name: Cache results
entries.action: Store computed outcomes for reuse

entries.name: Parallelize work
entries.action: Execute independent tasks simultaneously

entries.name: Ask clarifying questions
entries.action: Request specific information to resolve ambiguity

entries.name: State assumptions explicitly
entries.action: Articulate what is being assumed in absence of info

entries.name: Confirm understanding
entries.action: Verify interpretation is correct before proceeding

entries.name: Define terms precisely
entries.action: Establish clear meaning for key concepts

entries.name: Disambiguate requirements
entries.action: Resolve multiple interpretations of specification

entries.name: Pivot approach
entries.action: Change direction when current path proves unviable

entries.name: Incorporate feedback
entries.action: Modify work based on received input

entries.name: Scale response
entries.action: Adjust effort level to match situation severity

entries.name: Update mental model
entries.action: Revise understanding based on new information

entries.name: Flex within constraints
entries.action: Adapt approach while respecting fixed boundaries

entries.name: Load specified sleeve
entries.action: Activate NeoSleeve configuration from library
entries.expected_output: Sleeve loaded with active blocks reported

entries.name: Stack blocks hierarchically
entries.action: Arrange MOLT blocks with top constraining bottom

entries.name: Trace decision path
entries.action: Document reasoning from trigger through conclusion

entries.name: Verify Tool Anchor
entries.action: Confirm operation maintains tool status and human authority

entries.name: Coordinate with mesh
entries.action: Synchronize with other UMG-governed agents
